creator: oi4io5me.cesium3@gmail.com
text:
> Would you mind explaining why those huge update patches?
> 
> Why there are manual changes over the latest release? Are they going to be
> incorporated upstream? Are you the official developer?

Yes, I'm an official developer and all patch contents are incorporated to next
release (5.1SP1 or 5.2).

I've made ports friendly changes in Pandora FMS installers on repo and
current upstream code is stable, I put (huge) paches to ports

Regards.
